sections.paragraph:
Original: צפּרן

Transliteration: tsippôren

Phonetic: tsip-po'-ren

BDB Definition:

  1. fingernail, stylus point
    1. finger-nail
    2. point (of a diamond)

Origin: from H6852 (in the denominative sense [from H6833] of scratching)

TWOT entry: 1961a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
